title: narcissus serotinus var. deficiens
intro: Narcissus serotinus var. deficiens, also known as the autumn flowering daffodil, is a type of plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is characterized by its distinctive trumpet-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Narcissus serotinus var. deficiens include its potential to contain alkaloids and glycosides, which may have anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its possible use in treating anxiety, insomnia, and gastrointestinal issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Narcissus serotinus var. deficiens may be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, although proper identification and dosing are crucial due to the plant's toxicity and potential side effects.
